---
name: Documentation improvement

title: "[Docs]: "
labels: documentation
assignees: ''
---

## Documentation area

Which page, section, or example should be improved?

## Problem

What is confusing, missing, outdated, or hard to follow?

## Suggested improvement

Describe the change that would make the docs clearer.

## User path

Who would this help?

- [ ] First-time user
- [ ] Contributor
- [ ] Plugin/provider author
- [ ] Maintainer

## Additional context

Links, screenshots, commands, or related issues.
